title: Bread reborn: reborn
description: Bread reborn is a mod that adds many variations of bread, as well as cool things like grapes and grape vines
body:
![](https://github.com/YarikProgs/bread-reborn-reborn/blob/1.19.2-forge/src/main/resources/breadreborn.png?raw=true)

Bread reborn: reborn

It's not big, but unique minecraft mod. It's adding the millstone, mill, many variants of flours and breads, grape, grape vines, raisins and bread with raisins.

Here's all items in breadreborn:

  • Mill - is structure you can find in your world. There is one millstone and two chests.
  • Millstone - is block for flour making. Put stick in your second hand and material (wheat, nether mushrooms, choruses, sculk block) in your mainhand, then click on it.
  • Warped bread - gives you root soles effect. You take extremely less fall damage and are also feared by hoglins.
  • Crimson bread - gives you rage effect. If you take damage, you will speed up.
  • Chorus bread - gives you protective shell effect. You become immune to levitation, poison, and wither effects.
  • Sculk bread - gives you effects of darkness and regeneration
  • Golden bread (you can only find golden flour in mills and above dungeons) - gives you slightly better effects than golden apple
  • Grape grows on vines (these vines can be bought from a wanderer trader), or you can buy it directly
  • Raisins can be crafted by drying grapes on a campfire, but you can buy them from a wandering trader. You can bake bread with raisins from it
  • You can make wine from grape, It can give both a good effect and a bad one. You can't drink it with nausea or poisoning
All breads in the mod can be crafted by baking flour in a furnace or smoker
